apiKeyAuth.name: X-API-KEY
apiKeyAuth.description: Mobile API key required for all API requests.

stock.description: Current available stock of the product.

IdempotencyKey.name: Idempotency-Key
IdempotencyKey.description: Optional unique key to safely retry the same request without duplicate side effects.

201.description: Registration completed successfully. User code mapping: role_code(1=Superuser, 2=Admin, 3=User), status_code(1=Active, 2=Inactive, 3=Banned).

429.description: Too many requests. Slow down and retry later.

200.description: OK. User code mapping: role_code(1=Superuser, 2=Admin, 3=User), status_code(1=Active, 2=Inactive, 3=Banned).

403.description: Account is inactive or email is not verified.

429.description: Too many requests. Slow down and retry later.
Too many requests. Slow down and retry later.

422.description: Validation failed (wrong current password or invalid new password).

429.description: Too many requests. Slow down and retry later.

200.description: OK. User code mapping: role_code(1=Superuser, 2=Admin, 3=User), status_code(1=Active, 2=Inactive, 3=Banned).

avatar.description: Avatar URL or path (not multipart upload).

200.description: Profile updated. User code mapping: role_code(1=Superuser, 2=Admin, 3=User), status_code(1=Active, 2=Inactive, 3=Banned).

parameters.name: category_slug
parameters.description: Filter by category slug (alternative to category_id).

schema.description: Sort option: default=sort_order asc, random=shuffle products, popular|best_selling=sell_count desc, lowest|cheapest=price asc, highest|expensive=price desc, least_selling=sell_count asc

qty.description: Current quantity of this product in user active cart.

get.description: If bearer token is provided, response includes current user cart snapshot for this product (cart.item_id and cart.qty).

503.description: Unable to send reset OTP right now.

example.message: Unable to send reset OTP right now.

422.description: SMTP is disabled or request validation failed.

429.description: Too many requests. Slow down and retry later.

post.description: Send 6-digit OTP to user email for password reset. No bearer token required.

422.description: Invalid or expired reset OTP, or validation failed.

429.description: Too many requests. Slow down and retry later.

post.description: Reset password using email + 6-digit OTP code.

email.description: Registered email address to resend verification link.

503.description: Unable to send verification email right now.

example.message: Unable to send verification email right now.

422.description: SMTP is disabled or request validation failed.

429.description: Too many requests. Slow down and retry later.

post.description: Resend signed verification link to registered email.

get.description: Open this signed link from email to verify account. No X-API-KEY required.

503.description: Unable to send reset OTP right now.

example.message: Unable to send reset OTP right now.

422.description: SMTP is disabled or request validation failed.

429.description: Too many requests. Slow down and retry later.

post.description: Resend 6-digit OTP for password reset to the same email.

example.message: The latitude must be between -90 and 90.

latitude: The latitude must be between -90 and 90.

200.description: Cart cleared. Cart code mapping: status_code(1=Active, 2=CheckedOut, 3=Abandoned).
Item added. Cart code mapping: status_code(1=Active, 2=CheckedOut, 3=Abandoned).

post.description: Supports optional Idempotency-Key header to prevent duplicate cart mutations on client retry.

200.description: Item updated. Cart code mapping: status_code(1=Active, 2=CheckedOut, 3=Abandoned).

patch.description: Supports optional Idempotency-Key header to prevent duplicate cart update retries.

200.description: Item removed. Cart code mapping: status_code(1=Active, 2=CheckedOut, 3=Abandoned).

schedule_at.description: Legacy optional future datetime. Prefer schedule_date + schedule_slot_code.

schedule_date.description: Optional schedule date (YYYY-MM-DD). Must be combined with schedule_slot_code.

schedule_slot_code.description: Optional schedule slot code: 1=Pagi (07:00-10:00), 2=Siang (11:00-14:00), 3=Sore (15:00-17:00). Must be combined with schedule_date.

200.description: OK. Code mapping: fulfillment_type_code(1=Delivery, 2=Pickup), cart.status_code(1=Active, 2=CheckedOut, 3=Abandoned), schedule.slot_code(1=Pagi, 2=Siang, 3=Sore).

422.description: Cart empty or checkout validation failed.

200.description: OK. Order code mapping: fulfillment_type_code(1=Delivery, 2=Pickup), status_code(1=Pending, 2=Confirmed, 3=Packed, 4=OnDelivery, 5=Completed, 6=Cancelled), payment_status_code(1=Unpaid, 2=Paid, 3=Failed, 4=Refunded).

schedule_at.description: Legacy optional future datetime. Prefer schedule_date + schedule_slot_code.

schedule_date.description: Optional schedule date (YYYY-MM-DD). Must be combined with schedule_slot_code.

schedule_slot_code.description: Optional schedule slot code: 1=Pagi (07:00-10:00), 2=Siang (11:00-14:00), 3=Sore (15:00-17:00). Must be combined with schedule_date.

201.description: Order created. Order code mapping: fulfillment_type_code(1=Delivery, 2=Pickup), status_code(1=Pending, 2=Confirmed, 3=Packed, 4=OnDelivery, 5=Completed, 6=Cancelled), payment_status_code(1=Unpaid, 2=Paid, 3=Failed, 4=Refunded).

422.description: Cart empty or checkout validation failed.

post.description: Supports optional Idempotency-Key header to prevent duplicate order creation on network retry.

200.description: OK. Order code mapping: fulfillment_type_code(1=Delivery, 2=Pickup), status_code(1=Pending, 2=Confirmed, 3=Packed, 4=OnDelivery, 5=Completed, 6=Cancelled), payment_status_code(1=Unpaid, 2=Paid, 3=Failed, 4=Refunded).

Midtrans payment token created. Order code mapping: fulfillment_type_code(1=Delivery, 2=Pickup), status_code(1=Pending, 2=Confirmed, 3=Packed, 4=OnDelivery, 5=Completed, 6=Cancelled), payment_status_code(1=Unpaid, 2=Paid, 3=Failed, 4=Refunded).

422.description: Order cannot be paid or Midtrans rejected payload.

post.description: Supports optional Idempotency-Key header to prevent duplicate Midtrans token creation.

200.description: OK. Order code mapping: fulfillment_type_code(1=Delivery, 2=Pickup), status_code(1=Pending, 2=Confirmed, 3=Packed, 4=OnDelivery, 5=Completed, 6=Cancelled), payment_status_code(1=Unpaid, 2=Paid, 3=Failed, 4=Refunded).

429.description: Too many requests. Slow down and retry later.

200.description: Order cancelled. Order code mapping: fulfillment_type_code(1=Delivery, 2=Pickup), status_code(1=Pending, 2=Confirmed, 3=Packed, 4=OnDelivery, 5=Completed, 6=Cancelled), payment_status_code(1=Unpaid, 2=Paid, 3=Failed, 4=Refunded).

422.description: Order cannot be cancelled or request validation failed.

cancel_reason: The cancel reason field is required.

post.description: Supports optional Idempotency-Key header to prevent duplicate cancel requests.

parameters.description: Filter by category slug (alternative to category_id).

schema.description: Sort option: default=sort_order asc, random=shuffle products, popular|best_selling=sell_count desc, lowest|cheapest=price asc, highest|expensive=price desc, least_selling=sell_count asc

get.description: Alias endpoint for product search. Supports all filters from /api/products.
